name: SCOTTS MIRAC.GRO A DL-,01
summary: The Scotts Miracle-Gro Company is a marketer of branded consumer lawn and garden as well as hydroponic and indoor growing products. Through its subsidiary, The Hawthorne Gardening Company, the company is a distributor and manufacturer of lighting, nutrients and other products used in the indoor growing segment. The company is headquartered in Marysville, Ohio.
